nl_query: How many students are marked absent per exam?
failed_sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT sc.student_id) AS absent_student_count
FROM   exam_student_mapping esm
JOIN   student_cache sc
       ON sc.id = esm.student_id
JOIN   exam_schedule_cache esc
       ON esc.id = esm.exam_id
WHERE  esm.lifecycle_status = 'ABSENT';

                                    ^
